1706740.name: Jaws & Claws
1706740.description:
In the fictional world, populated by antropomorphic beasts, there is cruel TV-show. The participants of the show are sent to the dangerous island to compete, survive and win the big money prize.

Game genres

"Jaws & Claws" is a mix of such genres like 2D-platformer, fighter, beat'em up, party game. Gameplay is full of fights, gunfire, movement and rivalry.

Game Features

Characteristic features of fighting games: framedata, vif and blocking, spacing, strike links, combos, combo breakers, etc.
There are many different heroes with unique designs and characters, and the experience of playing for each hero is based on its built-in unique mechanics.
The Island mode is a classic example of an arcade platformer - many levels with obstacles, traps, the need to solve simple tasks and look for a way out.
Playing together in one or in different teams with other players, both in combat modes and in sports (football, basketball).
The game is played at a convenient pace, choosing different modes. From fast PVP matches to long PVE missions.

Game modes

- Island (story mode 14+ regions, 80+ stages)
- Fast match (up to 8 players/AI, Free for All, lots of stages)
- Team Brawl (2-4 teams of players/AIs, lots of stages)
- Rabbidball (sports mode, football/basketball analogue, 2 teams, lots of stages with various rules)
- Survival (1 or 2 players must survive agints waves of enemies)
- Boss Raid (small team engages the mighty bosses)
- Head to Head (classic fighter mode, player vs player, or player vs AI)
- Practice (mode to practice moves and combos)
- Tutorial (game basics is shown here)

Key features

Cooperative play in any mode, 2 to 8 players.
The ability to use a series of punches against your opponents using various interesting combinations.
Original Hard'n'Heavy soundtrack.

Playable characters

Crocco, Buzz, Kong Jr., Iggy, Rhino, Frosty, King, Mini, Jabber, Lupin, Catsu-Hero, Bosch, Tenrek, Sever.

Enemies

The player is confronted with 5 bosses, more than 20 different enemies and small creatures.
